Yes, I will be doing a Conversation with him. He is of course one of this last year's Nobel Laureates in economics, here is [previous MR coverage of him](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=7beeea40e4307b5ca3373ff8790fa8d5ac73e1e5e740c9ae97d0aee452ad01b3&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92354&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f3cbb50367431d85cc7bd89753e10aee&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tLz9zPW1va3ly&email_id=f78b00d3af8d592bc89db27ebe5afd7a). Here is [Wikipedia](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a02dea7a55d5774a0cd7b47e736d9a84e9c7e63840d67be1b3bf2274baff5e1c&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92354&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=5ea6dcb3dbff16c1a26d2a2c962ac2b2&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvSm9lbF9Nb2t5cg=&email_id=f78b00d3af8d592bc89db27ebe5afd7a).
He has a recent book [Two Paths to Prosperity: Culture and Institutions in Europe and China, 1000-2000](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=44c45e74d9c83226be1da3659b817c3408c138abe79580355131bbe2745c459f&blog_id=42693868&post_id=92354&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=958a98aa84dfe88fac3209d45f7eb63b&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=f78b00d3af8d592bc89db27ebe5afd7a), co-authored with Avner Greif and Guido Tabellini.
So what should I ask him?
